channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: The EU's Quest for Cloud Sovereignty: A New Era of Interoperability
item.description: The European Union's efforts to break free from US cloud domination have reached a significant milestone with the launch of the Sovereign European Cloud API (SECA). This new initiative aims to promote interoperability among rival cloud providers, making it easier for organizations to adopt hybrid or multicloud approaches.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
